sections.title: Fats

sections.title: Pros

closing.summary: Lima Beans has a genuinely strong overall case, especially filling for the calories and cheap staple with real payoff. the downsides are there, but can be rough on digestion for some people and can take planning or prep do not outweigh the upside. best when you want fibre, protein, and actual meal utility together.
